req.title: Submit leave request
req.statement: A full-time employee shall be able to submit a leave request for between 1 and 30 business days; requests spanning more than 30 days require hr-admin approval.
error_pathways: 422 when request exceeds 30 days without hr-admin

doc.reasoning: The requirement defines three equivalence partitions for business-day duration: [1-30] (valid, auto-approved), [>30] (requires hr-admin), and invalid ranges (start>end or overlapping). Boundary values occur at 1 day (lower bound), 30 days (upper bound of auto-approval), and 31 days (lower bound of hr-admin path). State transitions move a request through DRAFT→SUBMITTED→APPROVED/PENDING_HR_ADMIN. A decision table captures the interaction of duration, overlap, and date-order conditions. Negative paths test 400, 409, and 422 error codes explicitly.

tests.name: test_submit_valid_leave_request_within_30_days
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
No overlapping leave exists for the target date range
actions: Fill start_date with next Monday (business day)
Fill end_date 9 business days after start_date (10-day request)
expected: Leave request record created in system
trace: R-WEB-057: positive path for duration in [1,30]
R-WEB-057: Expected outcomes - request created; manager notified; notification email sent
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta

def test_submit_valid_leave_request_within_30_days(auth_full_time_page, api_client, mailbox):
    start, end = <get_next_business_day>(), <add_business_days>(start=<get_next_business_day>(), n=9)
    page = auth_full_time_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start_date']", start.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end_date']", end.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit_leave']")
    page.wait_for_selector("[data-testid='success_banner']")
    leave = api_client.get_latest_leave_request()
    assert leave["status"] in ("SUBMITTED", "APPROVED")
    assert leave["start_date"] == start.isoformat()
    assert leave["end_date"] == end.isoformat()
    assert mailbox.has_email_for(subject="Leave Request", recipient="manager")
    assert mailbox.has_email_for(subject="Leave Request", recipient="employee")
    api_client.delete_leave_request(leave["id"])

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_start_after_end_returns_400
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
actions: Fill start_date with a date 5 business days in the future
Fill end_date with a date 2 business days in the future (before start_date)
expected: Form shows validation error or API returns HTTP 400
No leave request record is created
trace: R-WEB-057: Error pathway - 400 when start_date > end_date
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_leave_request_start_after_end_returns_400(auth_full_time_page, api_client, mailbox):
    start = <add_business_days>(n=5)
    end   = <add_business_days>(n=2)
    page  = auth_full_time_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start_date']", start.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end_date']", end.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit_leave']")
    error_visible = page.is_visible("[data-testid='error_banner']")
    api_status = api_client.get_last_response_status()
    assert error_visible or api_status == 400
    count_before = api_client.count_leave_requests()
    assert count_before == api_client.count_leave_requests()
    assert not mailbox.has_email_for(subject="Leave Request", recipient="manager")

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_exactly_30_business_days_boundary
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
No overlapping leave exists for the target date range
actions: Fill end_date exactly 29 business days after start_date (30-day span)
expected: Request succeeds without requiring hr-admin approval
Leave status is SUBMITTED or APPROVED (not PENDING_HR_ADMIN)
trace: R-WEB-057: Upper boundary of auto-approval range (30 business days)
R-WEB-057: Requests of exactly 30 days do NOT require hr-admin
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_leave_request_exactly_30_business_days_boundary(auth_full_time_page, api_client):
    start = <get_next_business_day>()
    end   = <add_business_days>(base=start, n=29)
    page  = auth_full_time_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start_date']", start.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end_date']", end.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit_leave']")
    page.wait_for_selector("[data-testid='success_banner']")
    leave = api_client.get_latest_leave_request()
    assert leave["status"] not in ("PENDING_HR_ADMIN",)
    assert leave["business_days"] == 30
    api_client.delete_leave_request(leave["id"])

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_31_days_without_hr_admin_returns_422
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
No hr-admin approval has been granted for the request
actions: Fill end_date 30 business days after start_date (31-day span)
Submit the form without escalating to hr-admin
expected: Error message indicates hr-admin approval is required
trace: R-WEB-057: Error pathway - 422 when request exceeds 30 days without hr-admin
R-WEB-057: DT row: duration>30 AND no hr-admin approval => 422
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_leave_request_31_days_without_hr_admin_returns_422(auth_full_time_page, api_client):
    start = <get_next_business_day>()
    end   = <add_business_days>(base=start, n=30)
    page  = auth_full_time_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start_date']", start.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end_date']", end.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit_leave']")
    error_visible = page.is_visible("[data-testid='error_banner']")
    api_status = api_client.get_last_response_status()
    assert error_visible or api_status == 422
    error_text = page.inner_text("[data-testid='error_banner']")
    assert "hr-admin" in error_text.lower() or "approval" in error_text.lower()

tests.name: test_submit_overlapping_leave_request_returns_409
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
An existing approved leave request already covers the target date range
actions: Create an existing leave request via API for dates D+1 to D+5
Fill start_date with D+3 (overlaps existing leave)
trace: R-WEB-057: Error pathway - 409 when overlapping existing leave
R-WEB-057: STC - system in LEAVE_ACTIVE state rejects overlapping new request
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_overlapping_leave_request_returns_409(auth_full_time_page, api_client):
    base    = <get_next_business_day>()
    start_a = <add_business_days>(base=base, n=1)
    end_a   = <add_business_days>(base=base, n=5)
    existing = api_client.create_leave_request(start=start_a, end=end_a)
    try:
        start_b = <add_business_days>(base=base, n=3)
        end_b   = <add_business_days>(base=base, n=8)
        page    = auth_full_time_page
        page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
        page.fill("[data-testid='start_date']", start_b.isoformat())
        page.fill("[data-testid='end_date']", end_b.isoformat())
        page.click("[data-testid='submit_leave']")
        error_visible = page.is_visible("[data-testid='error_banner']")
        api_status    = api_client.get_last_response_status()
        assert error_visible or api_status == 409
    finally:
        api_client.delete_leave_request(existing["id"])

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_minimum_one_business_day
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
No overlapping leave exists for the target date
actions: Fill start_date and end_date with the same next business day (1-day request)
expected: Request succeeds with HTTP 201 or success redirect
Leave record created with business_days equal to 1
trace: R-WEB-057: Lower boundary of valid range (1 business day)
R-WEB-057: BVA min value for duration
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_leave_request_minimum_one_business_day(auth_full_time_page, api_client, mailbox):
    day  = <get_next_business_day>()
    page = auth_full_time_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start_date']", day.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end_date']", day.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit_leave']")
    page.wait_for_selector("[data-testid='success_banner']")
    leave = api_client.get_latest_leave_request()
    assert leave["business_days"] == 1
    assert leave["status"] in ("SUBMITTED", "APPROVED")
    assert mailbox.has_email_for(subject="Leave Request", recipient="manager")
    api_client.delete_leave_request(leave["id"])
